news.summary: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced an increase following a robust June jobs report. The stock prices of Nvidia and Palantir surged during the trading session. This positive momentum was highlighted in the live coverage of the stock market today, showcasing the gains made by these companies. The market reaction to the unexpected strength in the job market was evident in the rise of the Dow Jones index. The upbeat performance of Nvidia and Palantir added to the overall positive sentiment in today's trading session.
news.headline: Dow Jones index rises on surprise jobs report; Nvidia, Palantir gain ground. Stocks rally after strong June report.

news.summary: In Southampton, New York, a renowned arts and culture brand, BlackBook, in collaboration with UNESCO GEM Report, is set to unveil "MOTHER NATURE IN THE BARDO," an exhibition running from July to September 2025. This event follows their successful display in Chelsea, NYC, earlier this spring. The exhibit showcases the intersection of art and nature and is a continuation of their commitment to promoting cultural dialogue.
news.headline: BlackBook Hamptons Summer Art Exhibition in Southampton, July-Sept 2025, follows their NYC exhibit with UNESCO GEM Report.

news.summary: In Nashville, Tennessee on July 3, 2025, AllianceBernstein L.P. and AllianceBernstein Holding L.P. shared that they will be revealing their financial and operating outcomes for the Second Quarter of 2025 before the market opens on Thursday, July 24, 2025. This information will be of interest to investors as the NYSE: AB company management will also be hosting a discussion following the release.
news.headline: AllianceBernstein to announce Q2 2025 results on July 24; details to be released before market opens.

news.summary: In a recent development on July 3, 2025, AirMatrix announced the deployment of its AI system, Libra, to enhance national airspace security in Canada. The initiative is part of an agreement facilitated by Innovative Solutions Canada (ISC). Libra's integration marks a significant step forward in advancing "Sovereignty as a Service," aiming to bolster airspace protection.
news.headline: AirMatrix deploys AI Libra to Canadian govt through ISC for national airspace defense, offering "Sovereignty as a Service".

news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, as of July 3, 2025, a notable trend is the move from sterilization to scalability in the medical industry. This shift is being driven by the global single-use surgical instruments market, which was worth US$5.60 billion in 2024 and has now reached US$5.92 billion in 2025. Experts predict that this market will continue to grow at a steady compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 5.7%.
news.headline: Global single-use surgical instruments market valued at $5.60 billion in 2024, $5.92 billion in 2025, projected to reach $7.80 billion by 2030 with a CAGR of 5.7%.

news.summary: A resident of Port Richey, Florida and roofing contractor, shared his innovative creation of the A D R V that offers a more convenient method for reaching a clothes dryer exhaust from the roof. This new invention facilitates easy access for lint cleaning. The development was driven by the inventor's desire for a more efficient solution, and it showcases potential improvements in this aspect of roofing services. This initiative demonstrates the ongoing efforts of individuals in various industries to enhance existing processes and provide practical solutions.
news.headline: Inventor develops A D R V roof vent for dryer duct; enables easy lint cleaning. From Port Richey, Fla.

news.summary: The advancement of quantum computing technology may pose a threat to the security of Bitcoin holders. It could potentially allow for the decryption of private keys from public ones, jeopardizing the security of transactions. This development raises concerns for the approximately 13 million Bitcoin holders worldwide who rely on the security of their private keys to protect their digital assets.
news.headline: Lost Bitcoin may be recovered through quantum computing by reverse engineering private keys from exposed ones, jeopardizing holders' security.

news.summary: Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) has demonstrated strong growth, surging by 5% in a day due to positive developments within its ecosystem, ongoing token burns, and the overall momentum in the market. As per the latest data, Shiba Inu is priced at $0.00001182 with a market cap of $6.96 billion, showing a 7-day upward trend of 4.4%. In comparison, Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) stands at $0.1714 with a market cap of $25.8 billion, marking a 7% increase. Pepe (CRYPTO: PEPE) is priced at $0.00001033 with a market cap of $4.3 billion, experiencing an 11.5% growth. Notably, crypto trader Shib Knight mentioned that Shiba Inu has broken its downtrend pattern since May 13, potentially hinting at a reversal. With the return of bullish sentiment in the crypto space and supportive on-chain data, SHIB appears poised for a significant uptrend. Additionally, trader Joe Mitoshi pointed out that SHIB's long-term chart shows positive signals, indicating further potential growth. For more details, read the full story available on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Shiba Inu (SHIB) jumps 5% in a day, now $0.00001182 with $6.96 billion market cap. Bullish signals hint at a bigger rally.

news.summary: The report "Mulch Films - A Global Market Overview" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. The global market for Mulch Films is valued at approximately US$4.6 billion in 2024 and is expected to grow to US$7 billion by 2030, representing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 7.7% between 2024 and 2030. This comprehensive global report on Mulch Films examines the market by product type, material, type, and application. It also includes profiles of key companies in the industry.
news.headline: Global mulch films market to hit $7 billion by 2030, up from $4.6 billion in 2024. CAGR of 7.7% due to booming agriculture demand.

This innovative appliance combines sleek design with space-saving features. The RoastiTM is compact yet powerful, catering to consumers' needs with its multifunctionality.

Currently valued at USD 392.8 million in 2025, it is projected to reach USD 1,206.9 million by 2030, representing a remarkable Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 25.2%. news.summary: A consortium led by investors of Metaplanet is aiming to purchase DV8 on the Thailand stock exchange, in a move to introduce Bitcoin holdings to Southeast Asia. This potential acquisition signifies a significant expansion of Bitcoin investments in the region.
news.headline: Bitcoin Consortium aims to acquire DV8 on Thai market in push to expand cryptocurrency holdings into Southeast Asia, led by Metaplanet supporters.

news.summary: In Pittsburgh on July 3, 2025, an inventor from Warrior, Alabama introduced a new system for commercial kitchens to combat grease buildup on hoods and decrease cleaning and maintenance needs. The innovator shared their motivation behind creating the GREASE BUSTERS, emphasizing the aim to streamline operations. The invention has the potential to significantly reduce labor costs and enhance efficiency in kitchen maintenance.
news.headline: Inventor from Warrior, Ala. creates GREASE BUSTERS to reduce grease buildup and cleaning time in commercial kitchens.

news.summary: The market for customized premixes is categorized based on various types including vitamins, minerals, amino acids, nutraceuticals, and nucleotides. These premixes find application in beverages, dairy products, cereals, bakery and confectionery items, nutrition products, dietary supplements, as well as in processed foods like soups, pasta, and ready-to-eat meals. This market segmentation allows for targeted customization to cater to specific needs and preferences in different sectors.
news.headline: Customized Premixes Market anticipated to hit $1.47B by 2030 due to rising demand for personalized nutrition. Segments include vitamins, minerals, amino acids, nutraceuticals, nucleotides, and applications span across beverages, dairy, cereals, bakery, nutrition products, dietary supplements, and processed foods, among others.

news.summary: Primaris Real Estate Investment Trust, listed as PMZ.UN on the TSX, is set to announce its financial results for the quarter ending June 30, 2025, on July 30, 2025, after the market closes. Following this, senior leadership will conduct a conference call and webcast presentation on July 31, 2025. The conference call and webcast are scheduled for 10:00 a.m. (ET) on Thursday, July 31, 2025. Participants can join the call by dialing 1-833-950-0062 and using the passcode 846459. For the webcast, individuals can access the link provided in the Investor Relations section.
news.headline: Primaris REIT (TSX: PMZ.UN) to release Q2 financial results on July 30, 2025. Conference call/webcast on July 31 at 10:00 am ET. Dial 1-833-950-0062. Passcode: 846459.

news.summary: The US stock market saw gains with the Dow Jones index rising by over 200 points on Thursday. The Dow traded at 44,725.87, up 0.54%, while the NASDAQ gained 0.61% to 20,518.19, and the S&P 500 rose by 0.51% to 6,259.36. Utilities shares jumped by 0.9%, but consumer staples stocks slipped by 0.01%. Nonfarm payrolls rose by 147,000 in June, exceeding economists' expectations of 110,000, with the unemployment rate dropping to 4.1%. Global Interactive Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: GITS) shares surged by 142% to $3.92. La Rosa Holdings Corp. (NASDAQ: LRHC) also experienced a boost.
news.headline: Dow gains over 200 points as US nonfarm payrolls beat estimates. Nonfarm payrolls rose by 147,000 in June, with a dip in unemployment rate to 4.1%.

news.summary: In July, GeForce NOW has expanded its game library by adding 20 new titles, such as 'Figment' and 'Little Nightmares II'. These additions aim to elevate the cloud gaming capabilities by leveraging RTX technology.
news.headline: GeForce NOW adds 20 games like 'Figment' and 'Little Nightmares II' for July, boosting cloud gaming with RTX power.

news.summary: On July 3, 2025, St. Paul-based company 3M (NYSE: MMM) revealed details about an upcoming investor event. The event in question is the Second-quarter 2025 earnings conference call, scheduled for Friday, July 18, 2025, at 8 a.m. CT. This conference call will be broadcast live via webcast, and for those unable to attend in real-time, a replay will be accessible on 3M's Investor Relations website following the event.
news.headline: 3M to host Q2 earnings conference call on July 18, 2025, at 8 a.m. CT. Webcast event for investors.

news.summary: Renowned mountaineer Tyler Andrews, a world-record-holder, turns to the Wahl® Self-Clip 360™ for peak performance at extreme altitudes, such as 17,600 feet above sea level. In Sterling, Ill., on July 3, 2025, he shared how this grooming tool aids in his mental and physical sharpness while gearing up for challenges like Mount Everest. Andrews, an elite athlete, trusts the Wahl® Self-Clip 360™ for optimum readiness in the face of rigorous conditions.
news.headline: Mountain climber Tyler Andrews uses the Wahl Self-Clip 360 at 17,600 feet above sea level. A durable option for extreme grooming.

news.summary: On Thursday, Needham upgraded Meta Platforms, Inc. (NASDAQ: META) from Underperform to Hold. Analyst Laura Martin cited improved revenue and margin expectations for 2025, driven by Meta's strong labor productivity. While the stock is trading near all-time highs, the cautious stance remains. Meta topped large-cap peers in free cash flow per employee for 2024, thanks to its globally scaled, software-centric business model. The upgrade highlights Meta's exceptional performance in this aspect. For more details, readers can find the full story on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Needham upgraded Meta Platforms, Inc. to Hold on improved revenue expectations for 2025. Meta ranked first in free cash flow per employee in 2024.

news.summary: In Burlington, Vermont on July 3, 2025, Contify introduced Athena, its innovative Agentic AI insights engine as part of its AI-native Market and Competitive Intelligence (M&CI) platform. Athena aims to streamline M&CI processes by automating tasks and providing reliable, actionable market and competitor insights. This launch signifies a significant advancement in the AI technology sector.
news.headline: Contify introduces AI tool Athena for Market and Competitive Intelligence, automating processes, enhancing reliability for enterprises.

news.summary: Charlotte, North Carolina - On July 3, 2025, WorldWide HealthStaff Solutions (WWHS) announced a partnership with Books For Africa. WWHS, a renowned Medical Solutions organization specializing in global direct hire recruitment, has joined forces with Books For Africa, the primary distributor of donated books to Africa. This initiative aims to enhance educational access and opportunities in the continent.
news.headline: WorldWide HealthStaff Solutions and Books For Africa donate 40,000 medical books to Kenya via partnership.

news.summary: The global waste oil market is estimated to be valued at USD 34.55 billion in 2025 and is projected to reach USD 47.01 billion by 2032, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 4.5% from 2025 to 2032. The market growth is driven by environmental awareness, sustainable waste management solutions, and stringent regulations promoting waste oil recycling and reuse. By 2025, the used engine oil segment is expected to reach about USD 12.64 billion, with recycling and re-refining applications holding a market share of 35.7%. In terms of treatment methods, landfilling is predicted to account for over two-fifths of the global waste oil market share in 2025. North America is a significant market, with a share of 38.7% in 2025, while Asia Pacific is expected to exhibit the fastest growth due to rapid urbanization and industrialization. The industry faces challenges in high processing and recycling costs hindering market expansion, despite rising demand for recycled and refined waste oil products. Regulatory support for sustainable practices is creating growth opportunities in the market.
news.headline: Global Waste Oil Market expected to reach USD 47.01 Bn by 2032 with a 4.5% CAGR growth fueled by environmental awareness and regulations. North America leading with 38.7% share in 2025. Landfilling segment to account for over two-fifths market share in 2025. High processing costs limit market expansion. Explore: https://www.coherentmarketinsights.com/insight/buy-now/8008

news.summary: Dublin-based ResearchAndMarkets.com has recently released a report titled "Agricultural Surfactants - A Global Market Overview," which is now available for access. The global market size for agricultural surfactants currently stands at US$1.8 billion for 2024 and is projected to climb to US$2.6 billion by 2030, indicating a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 6.5% during the forecast period spanning from 2024 to 2030. The surge in the agricultural surfactants market is attributed to the escalating demand for improved crop protection and heightened agricultural output resulting from various factors.
news.headline: Global agricultural surfactants market valued at $1.8 billion in 2024, expected to reach $2.6 billion by 2030 with a CAGR of 6.5%.

news.summary: In July 3rd, 2025, economic data from TEMPE, Arizona showed positive growth in the services sector. The Business Activity Index stood at 54.2%, indicating expansion. New Orders Index followed at 51.3%, reflecting increased demand. However, there was a slight decline in the Employment Index at 47.2%, highlighting potential job market challenges. Supplier Deliveries Index was at 50.3%, indicating stable delivery times. This growth in economic activity came after a brief contraction the previous month.
news.headline: Services PMI® for June 2025 is at 50.8%, with Business Activity Index at 54.2% and Employment Index at 47.2%.

news.summary: In BROOMFIELD, Colorado, on July 3, 2025, the Air Force Research Laboratory (AFRL) chose BAE Systems (LON: BA) to further progress and aid in the deployment of the Battlefield Assisted Trauma Distributed Operations Kit (BATDOK®). This partnership aims to enhance medical support on the battlefield. The project focuses on optimizing the forces and aims to improve the handling of trauma cases.
news.headline: BAE Systems chosen by AFRL to develop AI software for battlefield medical care, including BATDOK® kit.

news.summary: Integris, a leading managed service provider based in Cranbury, New Jersey, has unveiled a fresh new brand identity and a cutting-edge security assessment tool as part of its strategic plan to lead client-focused IT services in the upcoming era. The company’s innovative approach is geared towards staying ahead in the industry, with a specific focus on providing top-notch services to its clientele. This move comes as Integris solidifies its position as a national leader in future-ready managed services.
news.headline: Integris unveils new brand with M365 Security & Compliance Assessment launch; aims to lead IT services with enhanced tool.
